totp.title: Two-factor authentication
totp.subtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app
totp.recoverySubtitle: Enter one of your recovery codes
totp.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.

wizard.title: Welcome to shulkr!
wizard.subtitle: Let's set up your first Minecraft server.
wizard.nameDescription: Choose a name for your server. The directory will be created automatically.
wizard.ramDescription: Choose based on the expected number of players.
wizard.flagsDescription: Aikar's recommended flags are applied by default for optimal performance.
wizard.aikarDescription: Industry-standard JVM flags optimized for Minecraft servers.

servers.title: Servers
servers.nameHint: The server directory and files will be created automatically
servers.jarHint: Change the active JAR file in server settings
servers.autoSetupInfo: The latest PaperMC version will be downloaded automatically. The server will be ready to start immediately.
servers.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
servers.deleteWarningFolder: This will permanently delete the server directory and all its files.
servers.backupQuestion: Would you like to create a backup before deleting?
servers.deleteMustBeStopped: The server must be stopped before it can be deleted.
servers.serverRunningWarning: The server is online. Modifying files or plugins while the server is running may cause errors or data loss.

console.startToViewLogs: Start the server to view logs

files.dropOrCreate: Drop files here or create a new folder
files.uploadDescription: Select files to upload to the server
files.uploadDropOrBrowse: Drop files here or click to browse

dbViewer.serverRunningWarning: The server is running, data may be incomplete or locked.
dbViewer.notSqlite: This file is not a valid SQLite database
dbViewer.corrupt: This database file appears to be corrupted
dbViewer.largeFileDesc: {{size}} will be loaded into your browser memory. This may affect performance.
dbViewer.name: Name

plugins.subtitle: Upload and manage server plugins
plugins.uploadFirst: Upload your first plugin to extend your server
plugins.uploadHint: Drag and drop your JAR file here
plugins.addPluginDescription: Upload or drag and drop a plugin JAR file
plugins.dropOrUpload: Drag and drop or use the Upload button

marketplace.searchHint: Search by name, author, or keyword

tasks.title: Scheduled Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Schedule automated server tasks
tasks.cronFormat: Format: minute (0-59) hour (0-23) day (1-31) month (1-12) weekday (0-6)

types.commandDesc: Execute a command on the server

tasks.deleteTaskDescription: Enter your password to confirm deleting this task.
tasks.timezoneBannerSame: The server time matches your local time. Tasks will run at the times shown.
tasks.timezoneBannerWarning: The server clock differs from yours, schedules use server time.
tasks.scheduleTimezoneTitle: Your server is in a different timezone
tasks.scheduleTimezoneDescription: The schedule you set above uses the server clock, which is {{diff}} compared to your local time. A task set for a given hour will not run at that hour for you.
tasks.scheduleTimezoneSameWithSchedule: This task will run at {{time}} (same as your local time).
tasks.timezoneExactSchedule: This task at {{serverHour}} (server time) will run at {{localHour}} your time.
tasks.timezoneRecurringSchedule: This task will run at the following times (server time → your time):
tasks.timezoneFrequentSchedule: This task runs frequently. Trigger times follow the server clock (starting from midnight server time).

metrics.noData: No data available for this period

players.subtitle: Manage players, whitelist and connection history.
players.name: Player
players.noBansDescription: No players or IPs are currently banned from this server.

backups.title: Backups
backups.subtitle: Manage server backups
backups.createFirst: Create your first backup to protect your server data
backups.dialogDescription: Choose which files and folders to include in the backup. All files are selected by default.

settings.title: Backup Settings
settings.maxBackupsDescription: Set to 0 for unlimited. When the limit is reached, the oldest backup is automatically deleted after each new backup.

logs.subtitle: View and search server logs
logs.noLogsYet: No logs yet. Start the server to generate logs.
logs.archiveDescription: Browse archived log files from previous server sessions
logs.noArchivesDescription: Log archives will appear here after server restarts
logs.mergeConfirm: Merge {{count}} archives into one file? Source files will be deleted.

settings.subtitle: Configure server JAR and JVM settings
settings.generalConfigDescription: Change the display name of this server. This does not affect the server path.
settings.serverNameHint: This name is only used for display purposes across the panel.
settings.deleteServerDescription: Permanently delete this server and all its associated files, including nginx and systemctl configurations. This action cannot be undone.
settings.addJarPaperMCDescription: Download a PaperMC server JAR directly from the official repository

jarUpload.invalidFile: Please select a valid JAR file

settings.availableJarsDescription: Manage and activate server JAR files
settings.noJarsFound: No JAR files found in server folder
settings.deleteJarDescription: Enter your password to confirm deleting this JAR file.
settings.aikarDescription: Aikar's Flags are recommended JVM optimizations for Paper/Spigot servers.
settings.customJavaPathHint: Full path to the java binary on your server
settings.autoStartDescription: Start server automatically when panel starts
settings.crashRecoveryDescription: Automatically restart the server if it crashes (max 3 restarts in 5 minutes)
settings.restartRequired: JVM configuration and port changes require a server restart to take effect.

firewall.title: Firewall Rules
firewall.description: Manage open ports for plugins and services
firewall.addRuleDescription: Open a port on the server firewall for a plugin or service.
firewall.noRulesHint: Open ports for plugins like GeyserMC or BlueMap
firewall.label: Label
firewall.infoPortRangeDesc: Allowed range is 1024–65535. Ports below 1024 are reserved by the system.
firewall.infoProtocolDesc: Each rule requires a protocol: TCP, UDP, or Both (TCP+UDP).
firewall.deleteRuleDescription: Enter your password to confirm deleting this firewall rule.

domains.title: Domains
domains.description: Configure custom domains with SSL for your server services
domains.addDomainDescription: Add a custom domain that points to a service on this server.
domains.noDomainsHint: Add a domain like map.example.com to access BlueMap, Dynmap, or other services
domains.enableSslTooltip: Generate a Let's Encrypt SSL certificate for this domain
domains.dnsHint: Add this A record in your domain registrar's DNS settings. It may take a few minutes to propagate.
domains.srvHint: Optional SRV record, allows players to connect without specifying the port

playerDomain.title: Connection domain
playerDomain.description: Configure a custom domain so players can connect to your Minecraft server
playerDomain.step2Desc: Go to your domain registrar and add an A record pointing to your server IP.
playerDomain.step2Hint: DNS propagation may take up to 30 minutes.
playerDomain.step3Desc: Add an SRV record so players can connect without specifying the port.
playerDomain.step3Hint: This SRV record allows direct connection using the domain, without manually adding the port.
playerDomain.step4Desc: Once the DNS records are configured at your registrar, confirm the domain addition.
playerDomain.srvWarning: The subdomain ({{subdomain}}) must appear after _tcp in the Protocol field. Otherwise the SRV record won't be found and players will need to enter the port manually.
playerDomain.srvTargetHint: The target must end with a dot (e.g. {{domain}}.) to be treated as an absolute name by your registrar.
playerDomain.srvTtlHint: A TTL of 600 seconds (10 min) is recommended for stable ping in the Minecraft launcher.

sftp.title: SFTP Access
sftp.description: Manage SFTP accounts and connection details for this server

connectionInfo.title: Connection details
connectionInfo.description: Use these details in your SFTP client to connect to this server

accounts.title: SFTP Accounts
accounts.description: Manage SFTP user accounts for this server
accounts.noAccountsHint: Create an SFTP account to allow file transfers to this server

dialog.createDescription: Create a new SFTP account for file transfers
dialog.usernameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, dashes or underscores
dialog.allowedPathsHint: Relative paths from the server root. Leave empty to allow all folders.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.disabled: 2FA is not enabled on your account
twoFactor.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication. You will be asked for a verification code when you sign in.
twoFactor.disabledDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account by enabling two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.setupDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app or enter the secret manually.
twoFactor.manualEntryHint: Enter this code in your password manager or authenticator app.
twoFactor.disableConfirm: Enter your 2FA code to confirm disabling.

recoveryCodes.title: Save your recovery codes
recoveryCodes.subtitle: These codes can be used to access your account if you lose your authenticator.
recoveryCodes.warning: Save these codes in a safe place. They will not be shown again. Each code can only be used once.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage panel access and permissions
users.noUsersDescription: Get started by adding your first user
users.cannotEditOwnPermissions: You cannot modify your own permissions
users.deleteDescription: Permanently delete {{username}}'s account. This cannot be undone.
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{username}}'s account? This action is irreversible.
users.deletePasswordPrompt: Enter your password to confirm this deletion.

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.emptyDescription: Actions performed by this user will appear here

docs.notFoundDescription: This documentation page does not exist.

environment.title: Environment
environment.subtitle: Below you may edit the .env file for your application, which is a standard default environment file that typically loaded by applications. If the application is uninstalled, the environment file will also be removed.
environment.restartWarning: Changes to environment variables require a panel restart to take effect. Run shulkr restart on the server.
environment.revealDescription: Environment variables should not be shared publicly.

systemd.title: Systemd Service
systemd.description: Automatically configured by the installation script

panelDomain.title: Panel Domain
panelDomain.description: Access your panel via a custom domain with HTTPS
panelDomain.restartWarning: Enabling SSL or changing the domain will restart the panel service. The access URL will change.
panelDomain.step1Title: Add a DNS record at your registrar
panelDomain.step1Desc: In your domain registrar's DNS settings (OVH, Cloudflare, etc.), add an A record pointing your subdomain to your server IP.
panelDomain.step1Hint: DNS propagation can take a few minutes up to a few hours.
panelDomain.step2Desc: Once the DNS record is configured, enter the domain and click Configure. This will update the Nginx configuration.
panelDomain.step3Desc: After configuration, click "Enable SSL" to generate a free Let's Encrypt certificate. Your panel will restart and become available at https://yourdomain.com.
panelDomain.sslSuccess: SSL certificate activated! Your panel is now available via HTTPS.

diskUsage.title: Disk Usage
diskUsage.description: Disk usage by Shulkr and the system

java.title: Java Runtimes
java.description: Pre-bundled Java versions available for your servers

sftp.title: SFTP Access
sftp.description: SFTP connection details for file transfer
sftp.changePasswordHint: To change the shulkr user password, log in as root on the server and run: sudo passwd shulkr

database.title: Shulkr Database
database.description: Explore the panel internal database in read-only mode

authErrors.tokenExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
authErrors.tokenInvalid: Invalid session. Please log in again.
authErrors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action
authErrors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

passwordGate.prompt: Enter your password to confirm this action.

errors.SERVER_JAR_NOT_FOUND: No JAR file configured. Upload a server JAR via the file manager, then select it in JAR settings.
errors.SERVER_JAVA_NOT_FOUND: No compatible Java installation found. Install Java or configure a custom path in JVM settings.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist.

welcome.title: Welcome to Shulkr
welcome.subtitle: Let's set up your panel in a few seconds.

security.title: Secure your account
security.subtitle: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security. You can also set this up later in Settings.
security.setupDescription: Scan the QR code or enter the secret in your authenticator app.
